pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and export_result.sh explicitly query 'http://localhost:8082/artifactory/example-repo-local/...', and setup_artifactory.sh confirms it is the default OSS repository.
setup_task.sh and export_result.sh assign this exact path to ARTIFACT_PATH and use it for the overwrite HTTP PUT tests.
setup_artifactory.sh sets ADMIN_USER='admin' and passes it to Artifactory configuration APIs. The user is also used by curl commands in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh.
setup_artifactory.sh sets ADMIN_PASS='password' and passes it to Artifactory configuration APIs. The password is also used by curl commands in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for jfrog_artifactory_env prevent_artifact_overwrite task by confirming that the environment and repositories are synthetically initialized via setup scripts. Verified that the expected target repository ('example-repo-local'), test artifact path ('org/apache/commons/commons-io/2.15.1/commons-io-2.15.1.jar'), and default admin credentials ('admin' / 'password') exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt and are used in the verifier's REST API checks in export_result.sh.
